ops.title: The athome shared-infra repo â€” what it is, its plan, and migration targets

ops.body:
**experiment@home** â€” GitHub/PyPI `experiment-at-home`, import + CLI `athome`, at `~/Code/experiment-at-home` (public, PolyForm-NC). Shared local-AI primitives extracted from `~/Code/cc-steer`, `~/Code/stream-trade`, `~/Code/write-like-me`, which all migrate onto it at the end. Bootstrapped with repo-bootstrap (uv+uv_build, flat `athome/`, Click CLI, Great Docs, PyPI trusted publishing). Core deps: click/anyio/httpx/loguru/pydantic/pydantic-settings + aiosqlite. **Hard constraint:** core imports on Python 3.14 free-threaded with GIL disabled (CI asserts `sys._is_gil_enabled()` False); native-dep features go behind extras + sidecar subprocesses (`athome.workers`).

The binding plan is `/Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-07/plans/across-this-project-stream-trade-lucky-music.md`. Phases: A core (config/cache/llmcache/workers+wire/progress/launchd/detach/sync/store/cli/ocr-types) â†’ v0.1.0; B serve recipes (rapid-mlx + mlx-vlm two-lane) / llm lanes+batch / ocr engines (dots.ocr+Apple Vision quality profile) + athome-ocr-paddle sidecar / modal / hf / embed / bakeoff â†’ v0.2.0; C research harness â†’ v0.3.0; D stream-trade migration (first, most surface; llama.cppâ†’Rapid-MLX gated by athome.bakeoff fidelity run) â†’ E cc-steer(+lab) â†’ F write-like-me.

**Design decisions that bind implementation:** all settings via pydantic-settings (per-module `Settings` bound to a `[section]`, `ATHOME_` env prefix, `~/.athome/config.toml`, secrets = required env fields); redesign APIs fresh (donors supply semantics/invariants, not signatures â€” adapt donors at migration, no compat shims); async-only SDK, sync only at CLI via `athome.cli.coro`; cache = object core + `@cached` decorator; llm = explicit lane funcs (`small`/`extract`/`local`/`batch`); ocr = profiles over compositional core. The v0.1 public surface spec is `docs/design/core-api.md` in-repo.

Progress (2026-07-13): **Phases A + B + C all engineering-complete and on origin/main, CI green on 3.13/3.14/3.14t** (main at f9351846). Phase A 175 tests; Phase B 362 tests; Phase C 626 total (whole suite). spawnllm 0.6.1 published to PyPI (added the OpenAiEndpointBackend with an injectable `transport`, powering `athome.llm.local`). Design + accepted-findings docs live under `docs/design/` in-repo (core-api, phase-a/b/c-api, phase-a/b/c-review-findings, research-security-model). Each phase's build lane ran a Workflow: fable design pass â†’ opus xhigh module agents â†’ codex finder/refuter â†’ fable synthesis.

**Phase C research harness** (`athome.research`) took TWO adversarial-refuter rounds beyond the first fix pass â€” the friendly passes undercounted. Final hardened state: immutability enforced by diffing the STAGED index vs incumbent BEFORE any commit object exists + scoring from a clean no-`.git` `git archive` checkout (closes the git-config RCE class where a candidate `git config core.fsmonitor`/`filter.*` in a shared worktree ran as operator); tight `mutable_paths` allowlist with symlink + Python-auto-loader rejection; judges bound to a concrete spawnllm backend (family derived, not declared) behind a single gated spend boundary (fail-closed cross-family, uncacheable controls, canonical vote-cache key, packet-hash golden gate); per-experiment flock + registry locks + validated cost/metric. **User picked Option A** (bounded fixes + clone isolation now; OS-sandbox containment deferred): three limits are DOCUMENTED-not-fixed in `docs/design/research-security-model.md` â€” metric authorship (candidate `metric_command` code can write a forged metric + `os._exit`), process-group escape (setsid), cost-forge via the shared run log â€” all needing a future sandboxed-execution increment. See [[codex-security-review-content-filter]].

**Blocked (needs the user):** the v0.1.0/v0.2.0/v0.3.0 â†’ PyPI tags need a one-time manual PyPI **pending-publisher registration** for `experiment-at-home` (login+2FA/Touch ID â€” can't run headless; cookiesync had no live peer to approve). cc-notes task f0fb928. Required before Phase D (stream-trade migration pins athome from PyPI). Everything else (B/C build) proceeds without it.

Use `jj`/`ccx vcs ship` not raw git ([[jj-colocated-raw-git-push-noop]]); always verify origin via `gh api .../commits/main`.
